full_text:
Ma Yuanyi 馬元義
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ma Yuanyi (馬元義). Follower of Zhang Jue and the Yellow Scarves. Torn asunder by chariots for treason. Ma Yuanyi was affiliated with Yellow Scarves. Ma Yuanyi lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
